title: New Era Chicago Bulls NBA Heather Snapback Cap Kappe 9fifty 950 S M Basecap Grey
description: Die NBA Heather 9FIFTY Original Fit Snapback Cap von New Era in SMALL-MEDIUM ist eine grau melierte Kappe mit dem eckigeren Original Fit - Visor. Der Snapback Verschluss entspricht farblich der Krone der Kappe. Der Unterschirm ist passend zum Oberschirm gehalten, allerdings nicht meliert. 80% Acrylic 20% Wool SMALL-MEDIUM Snapback=Verstellbarer Verschluss hinten

New Era Cap Company, Inc. wurde 1920 gegründet und ist der führende Hersteller von Headwear und New-Era-Kleidung. Das Unternehmen bringt Produkte auf den Markt, die über Zeit, Kultur, Sport und Mode hinausgehen. Mit einer Produktionsauflage von über 35 Millionen Kappen pro Jahr ist New Era der exklusive Hersteller und Lieferant der offiziellen Kappen, die von allen Teams der Major League Baseball und ihren Partnern in der Minor League getragen werden. Darüber hinaus bestehen Abkommen mit anderen Lizenzpartnern. Unter Kennern ist New Era für seinen charakteristischen Kappenstil 59FIFTY als Originator of the True Fitted bekannt. Das Unternehmen hat seinen Hauptsitz in Buffalo, New York, und betreibt Werke in Alabama, Kanada, Europa, Japan und Hongkong. New Era Cap ist teilnehmendes Unternehmen der Fair Labor Association.

title: Cate & Chloe Esme Esteemed 18k White Gold Plated Knuckle Ring with Crystals, Unique Adjustable Rings, Twilight Sparkle Stackable Rings, Trendy Fashion Statement Promise Ring
features: ADJUSTABLE, STACKABLE RING - This Adjustable Gold Plated Crystal Open Ring is the perfect way to add some subtle sparkle to your wardrobe. and you don't have to spend a ton to look fabulous. It's so versatile you can wear them alone as a knuckle ring on any finger or stacked with your engagement ring. Really, you can’t have a better accessory on your fashion team.

CRYSTAL, FASHION ACCESSORIES - Designed and created with the modern woman in mind. With the use of real Crystals, it gives women the assurance that this is of excellent quality and will stand the test of time. A delicate and vintage- inspired crystal open finger ring that is a true standard to any woman’s accessory collection that can be easily be transitioned from day to night, and from the office to a date with that special someone.

WHITE GOLD, KNUCKLE RING - This double-banded ring features a sparkling line of stones on one 18k white gold plated band to class up any evening occasion! A single eye-catching stone on the other band goes to prove that true individuality always shines. This is an extremely versatile ring that can mix and match to create your favorite everyday look.

PROMISE RING - Looking for a simple and elegant accessory that is timeless? This is it! This Adjustable 18k Gold ring is delicate in design but with an irresistible beauty and timeless style! The perfect Christmas, anniversary, bridesmaids, or best friend gift that says I love you. This open finger ring is that ring that she will always think of you in a loving and adoring way.

WARRANTY AND BRAND PROMISE – Cate & Chloe offers a 30-day warranty on this product. Cate & Chloe jewelry stands by the quality of their jewelry and customer satisfaction is the number one core value of the company. Love and wear your jewelry without worry!
